items.summary: Add 19 crystal products to the static products data file (frontend/src/data/products.ts). Each crystal must have two entries: one for the raw form and one for the bracelet form. All 19 crystals are: Clear Quartz (The Master Healer), Amethyst (Spirituality & Protection), Rose Quartz (Love & Compassion), Black Tourmaline (Grounding & Protection), Green Aventurine (Luck & Prosperity), Labradorite (Transformation & Magic), Selenite (Cleansing & Clarity), Fluorite (Focus & Clarity), Aquamarine (Calm & Communication), Malachite (Transformation & Heart Chakra), Black Obsidian (Negativity Shield), Carnelian (Creativity & Motivation), Moonstone (Intuition & Feminine Energy), Lapis Lazuli (Wisdom & Truth), Pyrite (Wealth & Energy), Tiger's Eye (Courage & Confidence), Moldavite (Transformation), Blue Lace Agate (Calmness), Garden Quartz (Grounding & Manifestation). Each product's base price must be ₹600 (raw forms) and ₹800 (bracelet forms) before any markup. The description for each must mention the crystal's metaphysical property (e.g., 'The Master Healer'). Product type must be 'crystal' for raw forms and 'bracelet' for bracelet forms. Image paths must reference the corresponding generated product images from frontend/public/assets/generated/.

Replace the broken QR code image in the payment section (Appointment.tsx) with the newly generated correct QR code image saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/qr-code.png. Update the img src to point to this path. The QR code displayed must match the uploaded image exactly (Ishita Singh, UPI ID: 9305831180@pthdfc, Kotak Mahindra bank).
